notes: nested_eval_log_loss is unbiased: weights fitted on 2024-01 to 2025-06, scored on 2025-07 to 2026-06. blend_benefit_over_tabpfn_honest is negative, meaning TabPFN alone outperforms the ensemble on the held-out period. The all-OOF weights are used for production because they use more data; use nested metrics for honest generalization estimates.
